Draft Term Sheet — Confidential (MNPI): Proposed acquisition of 60% of PalmGate Mobility JSC (issuer listed on the Diriyah Growth Market) by Alkhalid Holdings LLC (the Buyer).
Buyer: Alkhalid Holdings LLC (CR 2051198765; VAT Registration 312345678900003); HQ: Al Qamar Business Park, Al Waha District, Riyadh 12555, KSA; contact: corpsec@alkhalidholdings.example, +966 55 612 4830.
Issuer: PalmGate Mobility JSC (CR 1017789453; DGM code PGMT); registered office: Al Manhal Plaza, King Saud Road, Riyadh 12233, KSA; DPO: privacy@palmgate.example.
Consideration: SAR 220,000,000 for 22,000,000 ordinary shares (SAR 10.00 per share), subject to completion accounts and working-capital adjustment mechanisms customary in the Kingdom.
Funding: Buyer to draw SAR 150,000,000 bridge from Red Dune Bank KSA (IBAN SA3875000000123456789012) and balance from internal cash; settlement in SAR via CMA-compliant escrow.
Conditions Precedent: (i) market regulator non-objection and Diriyah Growth Market disclosure clearance; (ii) no trading by the parties on MNPI; (iii) fairness opinion; (iv) no material adverse change.
Data Protection and Transfers: Processing of personal data under Kingdom PDPL; any cross-border transfer (e.g., to a processor in Manama) requires SDAIA permit and documented safeguards; minimize and pseudonymize data in issuer workflows.
Key Contacts (Issuer): Mr. Rashid Al‑Saif (CFO), National ID/Iqama 2012345671, phone +966 50 914 2234, rashid.alsaif@palmgate.example; for draft circulation only, checksum not validated.
KYC for Signatories: Mr. Rashid Al‑Saif passport XN9123456 and Buyer authorized signatory Eng. Mariam Al‑Harbi passport ZQ0045123 will be verified by the escrow agent upon signing with consent.
Tax and Registration: Issuer Zakat/TAX No. 311456789000013; Buyer maintains updated UBO records and will provide CR extracts and certified specimen signatures.
Payment Instructions: Escrow account details to be provided upon regulator confirmation; placeholder IBAN SA000000000000000000000 (do not use) included for formatting only.
Generic labels (non-identifying): Name: __________ Position: CFO; Role-only references appear in drafts and are not personal data without accompanying identifiers.
Issuer Non-Public Information: Q3 backlog SAR 480,000,000 and pending fleet lease renegotiation with Sandstorm Leasing Co. are not public; treated as MNPI until official DGM announcement.
Approvals and Issuer Workflow: Board approval targeted 20 Dhu al‑Hijjah 1447H; extraordinary general assembly and market filing within 10 business days thereafter; simultaneous posting to issuer portal and Diriyah Growth Market.
Public helpline (generic): 800-123-0000 is for general information only and is not a transaction contact channel.
Exclusivity/Standstill: 60-day exclusivity; Buyer and Seller agree to standstill obligations, clean team data rooms, and SDAIA-registered cross-border transfer logs for any processor outside KSA.
